title: sida diffusa var. setosa
intro: Sida diffusa var. setosa, also known as Bhumyamalaki, is a type of plant native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Malvaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bhumyamalaki include its ability to support liver health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Bhumyamalaki is often used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine and can be prepared as a decoction, powder, or juice for various herbal remedies.
